pr.title: Add Combined Int6 + QAT + Sliding Window submission

output.summary: Blend Int6 quantization with late QAT, sliding-window eval, and cosine warmdown on a high-LR Muon schedule for a 9-layer GPT with FP16 tied embeddings.
techniques: Int6 QAT with STE in final 30% to minimize quant penalty
Batched sliding-window eval with cosine warmdown and higher Muon momentum warmup
FP16 tied embeddings/Late-K passthrough with AdamW and decoupled weight decay
